Balllstlc Plate Armor This consists of thick armor plates made from dozens of alternating layers of laminated carbon fibers and heat-resistant polymers that provide almost  unequaled protection   against even light support weapons_ Plate armor interferes with move Ment, however, making unsuitable tor most infantrymen the other hand; it is ideal for urban fighting and other close-quar ters combat where nasty surprises can lurk benind every corner Many police agencies and special-forces teams issue ballistic plate armor t0 their tactical units_ It is difficult to repair; piece of plate armor is reduced below half of its original value, it must be replaced Ballistic plate armor comes as suit and vest; and the standard-issue combat helmet is made of simi ar material:
COMBAT UNIFORMS No matter the unit Or environment, the uniforms worn by combat troops across known space have similarities The styles listed below can be found almost any color and camouflage pattern imaginable ad are readily worn with the multitude of different armors and load bearing variations
Jump Suit This mechanics.
one-piece unitorm popularized
pilots and
Fatigues Fatigues_ with their multiple pockets and resilient fabric are two piece uniform (shirt and trousers), They can be found just about ay exchange or even many large civilian clothing stores;
Leather Clothing Leather coats vests_ shoes and gloves are made either from genuine anima hide or from synthetic substitutes_
Combat Boots These are heavy boots designed to protect the wearer'S feet against the lements_ They are tough enough to deflect sorne weapol attacks and also provide enough stability to pre- vent most common sprains and breaks
Heavy Combat Gloves Too bulky be commonly worn_ these gloves are combi- nation flak and ablative plates. They are usually used by riot police and explosives teams_
Cold Weather Gear Soldiers often find themselves in environments that require specialized clothing; else they fall victim to the environment: Extreme cold weather is one of the most difficult to adapt to. The following gear; while bulky: can allow soldier t0 operate temperatures down to -15*C, Parka: These oversized coats are designed to fit over bulky uniforms and other cold-weather clothing: Most parkas include hood that provides excellent head protection_ Snow Sult: Tnis one-plece tull body suit_ While extreme warm; these suits are designed to be worn over the most basic of undergarments, prohibiting the use other clothing armor
LOAD-BEARING EQUIPMENT Soldiers can become overloaded with all of the weapons_ ammunilion and supplies they are expected carty: Specialized vests and backpacks nelp soldier carry the maximum possible Ioad while keeping everything organized ad easily accessible Each of the load-bearing equipment items below be worn over body armor custom-built onto the armor itselt.
Vest Pouches mounted o the front and sides of the vesi pro- vide room up to eight standard ammunition magazines Or Poner packs and all the basic gear soldier needs the field Mounting points on the back of the vest allow attachment of larger gear, such as military power packs and bedrolls.
BATTLE ARMOR First designed and fielded by the Clans some centuries ago, powered armor still relatively new concept t0 tne Inner Sphere_ The suit can withstand damage from the heaviest of weapons_ While heavy and cumbersome the suit Is relatively flexible Tne pilot $ actions translated into myomer enhanced movements of the suit. hence the term power armor. Many designs also equipped with jump jets, further enhancing their mobillity: The suits combat capabilities make them feared across the Inner Spnere and Clan space_ Even the lightest of power- armor suits mounts support-class weapon while the heaviest suits can mount SRM tubes and even Mech class lasers Most also have functioning hands claws; when coupled with the
Pack Field packs_ also known as rucksacks_ can hold enough gear and supplies to keep soldier functioning in the field for at least two weeks   They are easily attached t0 oad bearing vest packframe and are even easier t0 remove. Characters expend Simple Action to drop the pack but must use Complex Action t0 reattach
Packframe The packframe is frame which pack can be mount permits soldier to carry greater Ioad than just vest;
